message.content: {"response":"Establishing the first tiny live autonomy pilot seed: I’ll preserve one explicitly bounded follow-up item and schedule a single wake to resolve it.","open_items":[{"handle":"pilot-metrics-spec-1","description":"Draft and confirm a minimal, concrete success-metric spec for the first tiny live autonomy pilot (1–2 primary quantitative metrics plus one qualitative check) based on the initial recall context.","scope":"Very small: only define the initial metric set and how it will be observed during the first pilot run; do not design experiments, dashboards, or iterations yet.","inputs_expected":["Initial pilot description and constraints from recall context ac3714c2-7f3b-5a4f-b1ff-6a4e1d237eae","Any already-stated business or safety objectives for the pilot"],"done_definition":"A short written metric spec exists with: (1) 1–2 primary metrics (including definitions and units), (2) one qualitative observation to capture, and (3) a brief note on when and how each will be observed during the first pilot run.","owner_role":"assistant","status":"open"}],"schedule_requests":[{"purpose":"Resolve the open metrics-spec follow-up item for the first tiny live autonomy pilot by using the recall context to propose a concrete minimal metric set.","requested_context":[{"tool":"recall","record_id":"ac3714c2-7f3b-5a4f-b1ff-6a4e1d237eae"}]}]}
